parameters.query: SET LOCAL app.current_entity = 'all'; SELECT e.id AS email_id, e.event_id AS source_event_id, e.subject, e.body_text, e.from_address FROM emails e WHERE e.from_address ILIKE '%@caterbook.%' AND (e.subject ILIKE 'New Reservation%' OR e.subject ILIKE 'Cancelled Reservation%' OR e.subject ILIKE 'Modified Reservation%') AND e.received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM accommodation_bookings ab WHERE ab.email_id = e.id) ORDER BY e.received_at DESC LIMIT 50;

SET LOCAL app.current_entity = '1'; INSERT INTO accommodation_bookings (entity_id, source, source_ref, status, guest_name, room, checkin_date, checkout_date, adults, children, meal_plan, currency, gross_amount, commission, tax, total_amount, email_id, source_event_id, raw_text) VALUES (1, '{{ $json.source }}', '{{ $json.source_ref }}', '{{ $json.status }}', $pl${{ $json.guest_name || '' }}$pl$, $pl${{ $json.room || '' }}$pl$, {{ $json.checkin_date ? "'" + $json.checkin_date + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.checkout_date ? "'" + $json.checkout_date + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.adults ?? 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.children ?? 'NULL' }}, $pl${{ $json.meal_plan || '' }}$pl$, '{{ $json.currency || 'GBP' }}', {{ $json.gross_amount ?? 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.commission ?? 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.tax ?? 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.total_amount ?? 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.email_id }}, {{ $json.source_event_id ?? 'NULL' }}, $pl${{ $json.raw_text }}$pl$) ON CONFLICT (entity_id, source, source_ref) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, guest_name = EXCLUDED.guest_name, room = EXCLUDED.room, checkin_date = EXCLUDED.checkin_date, checkout_date = EXCLUDED.checkout_date, adults = EXCLUDED.adults, children = EXCLUDED.children, meal_plan = EXCLUDED.meal_plan, gross_amount = EXCLUDED.gross_amount, total_amount = EXCLUDED.total_amount, email_id = EXCLUDED.email_id, raw_text = EXCLUDED.raw_text, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id; INSERT INTO audit_log (pipeline, action, ai_worker, ai_parsed, result, provider) VALUES ('p6b-caterbook-bookings', 'parsed_reservation', 'caterbook_bookings_parser', $pl${{ JSON.stringify({email_id: $json.email_id, source: $json.source, source_ref: $json.source_ref, status: $json.status, guest: $json.guest_name, total: $json.total_amount}) }}$pl$::jsonb, 'success', 'local') RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO audit_log (pipeline, action, ai_worker, ai_parsed, result, provider) VALUES ('p6b-caterbook-bookings', 'unparseable', 'caterbook_bookings_parser', $pl${{ JSON.stringify({email_id: $json.email_id, reason: $json.reason || 'unknown', subject: $json.subject}) }}$pl$::jsonb, 'failure', 'local') RETURNING id;
